steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for PETRORECÔNCAVO S.A. as of 2025-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Input values from the provided tables (ÚLTIMO 2025-03-31)
ativo_total = 7454930000.0
ativo_circulante = 1573777000.0
caixa = 315621000.0
aplic_fin = 702215000.0
contas_receber = 355003000.0
estoques = 19734000.0
tributos_rec = 100087000.0
outros_ac_circ = 81117000.0
ativo_nao_circ = 5881153000.0
imobilizado = 5573251000.0
intangivel = 76148000.0

passivo_circulante = 636063000.0
fornecedores = 367947000.0
emprestimos_fin_cur = 67824000.0
outras_obrigacoes_cur = 32652000.0
provisoes_cur = 171000.0

passivo_nc = 2355077000.0
emprestimos_fin_nc = 1788205000.0
outras_obrigacoes_nc = 375425000.0
provisoes_nc = 191447000.0

patrimonio_liq = 4463790000.0
capital_social = 2832624000.0
reservas_lucro = 1318945000.0
lucros_acumulados = 227529000.0

# Income statement Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO quarter) and Q1 2024 (PENÚLTIMO quarter)
rev_q1_2025 = 860752000.0
cogs_q1_2025 = -540866000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 319886000.0
ope_q1_2025 = -60121000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 259765000.0
fin_q1_2025 = 48997000.0
pretax_q1_2025 = 308762000.0
tax_q1_2025 = -81233000.0
net_q1_2025 = 227529000.0

rev_q1_2024 = 744735000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 268887000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 199490000.0
net_q1_2024 = 110033000.0
depr_q1_2025 = -164082000.0
depr_q1_2024 = -153862000.0

# Annual 2024 values (ÚLTIMO in annual table)
rev_2024 = 3264554000.0
gross_2024 = 1191749000.0
ebit_2024 = 948220000.0
net_2024 = 437498000.0
depr_2024 = -694816000.0

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 293452126
total_shares_treasury = 352936
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury
price = 13.34

# Disponibilidades: caixa + aplicacoes financeiras (assumption)
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin

# Divida bruta: sum of current and non-current 'Empréstimos e Financiamentos'
div_bruta = emprestimos_fin_cur + emprestimos_fin_nc

# Divida liquida
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# Receita (12 months) TTM = rev_2024 + q1_2025 - q1_2024
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
# EBIT TTM
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
# Net income TTM
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024

# Depreciation TTM
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
# EBITDA TTM
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + abs(depr_ttm)

# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# Enterprise Value (EV) = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

# Per share metrics
eps_ttm = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares_outstanding
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / shares_outstanding
assets_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - estoques  # assumption
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding
bv_per_share = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding

# Ratios
pl = price / eps_ttm if eps_ttm != 0 else float('inf')
pvp = price / bv_per_share if bv_per_share != 0 else float('inf')
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else float('inf')
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share != 0 else float('inf')
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share != 0 else float('inf')
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else float('inf')
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm != 0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else float('inf')

lpa = eps_ttm
vpa = bv_per_share

# Margins (use TTM)
marg_bruta = (gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024) / rev_ttm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100
marg_liquida = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = ebit_ttm / roic_denom * 100

# ROE
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq * 100

# Liquidez Corr: (Ativo Circulante - Estoques) / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = (ativo_circulante - estoques) / passivo_circulante

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq * 100

# Giro Ativos = receita líquida / total de ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

# Prepare results
results = {
    'Ativo': ativo_total,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': patrimonio_liq,
    'Receita La (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro Lo (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita La (3 meses)': rev_q1_2025,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2025,
    'Lucro Lo (3 meses)': net_q1_2025,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta (%)': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT (%)': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. La (%)': marg_liquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo (%)': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC (%)': roic,
    'ROE (%)': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim (%)': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos,
    'Market Cap': market_cap,
    'EV': ev,
    'EBITDA (TTM)': ebitda_ttm,
}

# Print results neatly
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Reconstruct final indicator list with required names and rounding
res = {
  'Ativo': 7454930000.0,
  'Disponibilidades': 1017836000.0,
  'Ativo Circulante': 1573777000.0,
  'Dív. Bruta': 1856029000.0,
  'Dív. L�edquida': 838193000.0, # temporary key, will map
  'Patrim. L�fq': 4463790000.0,
}
# Use computed variables from previous run? We'll recompute necessary values here
ativo_total = 7454930000.0
disponibilidades = 1017836000.0
ativo_circulante = 1573777000.0
div_bruta = 1856029000.0
div_liquida = 838193000.0
patrimonio_liq = 4463790000.0
rev_ttm = 3380571000.0
ebit_ttm = 1008495000.0
net_ttm = 554994000.0
rev_q1_2025 = 860752000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 259765000.0
net_q1_2025 = 227529000.0

shares_outstanding = 293452126 - 352936
price = 13.34

# per share
eps_ttm = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares_outstanding
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / shares_outstanding
assets_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - 636063000.0
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - 19734000.0
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding
bv_per_share = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding

# Market cap and EV
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

# EBITDA
depr_ttm = -694816000.0 + -164082000.0 - -153862000.0
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + abs(depr_ttm)

# Ratios
pl = price / eps_ttm
pvp = price / bv_per_share
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / rev_per_share
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm

# Margins and returns
gross_ttm = 1191749000.0 + 319886000.0 - 268887000.0
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100

ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total * 100
roic = ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - 367947000.0 - 315621000.0) * 100
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq * 100
liquidez_corr = (ativo_circulante - 19734000.0) / 636063000.0
divbr_patrim_ratio = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

# Build final array according to enum names
indicators = []
add = lambda name, val: indicators.append({'indicator': name, 'value': val})
add('Ativo', round(ativo_total,2))
add('Disponibilidades', round(disponibilidades,2))
add('Ativo Circulante', round(ativo_circulante,2))
add('Dív. Bruta', round(div_bruta,2))
add('Dív. Líquida', round(div_liquida,2))
add('Patrim. Ldq', round(patrimonio_liq,2))
add('Receita Ldida (12 meses)' if False else 'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)', round(rev_ttm,2))
add('EBIT (12 meses)', round(ebit_ttm,2))
add('Lucro Líquido (12 meses)', round(net_ttm,2))
add('Receita L�edquida (3 meses)', round(rev_q1_2025,2))
add('EBIT (3 meses)', round(ebit_q1_2025,2))
add('Lucro Líquido (3 meses)', round(net_q1_2025,2))
add('P/L', round(pl,6))
add('P/VP', round(pvp,6))
add('P/EBIT', round(p_ebit,6))
add('PSR', round(psr,6))
add('P/Ativos', round(p_ativos,6))
add('P/Cap. Giro', round(p_cap_giro,6))
add('P/Ativ Circ Liq', round(p_ativ_circ_liq,6))
add('EV / EBITDA', round(ev_ebitda,6))
add('EV / EBIT', round(ev_ebit,6))
add('LPA', round(eps_ttm,6))
add('VPA', round(bv_per_share,6))
# Margins and returns percentages with two decimals
add('Marg. Bruta', round(marg_bruta,2))
add('Marg. EBIT', round(marg_ebit,2))
add('Marg. Líquida', round(marg_liq,2))
add('EBIT / Ativo', round(ebit_ativo,2))
add('ROIC', round(roic,2))
add('ROE', round(roe,2))
add('Liquidez Corr', round(liquidez_corr,6))
add('Div Br/ Patrim', round(divbr_patrim_ratio,6))
add('Giro Ativos', round(giro_ativos,6))

import json
print(json.dumps({'indicators': indicators}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

ativo_total = 7454930000.0
disponibilidades = 1017836000.0
ativo_circulante = 1573777000.0
div_bruta = 1856029000.0
div_liquida = 838193000.0
patrimonio_liq = 4463790000.0
rev_ttm = 3380571000.0
ebit_ttm = 1008495000.0
net_ttm = 554994000.0
rev_q1_2025 = 860752000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 259765000.0
net_q1_2025 = 227529000.0

shares_outstanding = 293452126 - 352936
price = 13.34

eps_ttm = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares_outstanding
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / shares_outstanding
assets_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - 636063000.0
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - 19734000.0
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding
bv_per_share = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding

market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# EBITDA TTM
depr_ttm = -694816000.0 + -164082000.0 - -153862000.0
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + abs(depr_ttm)

pl = price / eps_ttm
pvp = price / bv_per_share
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / rev_per_share
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share

market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm

# Margins
gross_ttm = 1191749000.0 + 319886000.0 - 268887000.0
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100

ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total * 100
roic = ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - 367947000.0 - 315621000.0) * 100
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq * 100
liquidez_corr = (ativo_circulante - 19734000.0) / 636063000.0
divbr_patrim_ratio = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

indicators = [
    {'indicator':'Ativo','value':round(ativo_total,2)},
    {'indicator':'Disponibilidades','value':round(disponibilidades,2)},
    {'indicator':'Ativo Circulante','value':round(ativo_circulante,2)},
    {'indicator':'Dí�v. Bruta'.encode('latin1').decode('latin1'),'value':round(div_bruta,2)}
]

# The above attempted to include special char; instead use the exact string from enum list directly below
indicators = [
    {'indicator':'Ativo','value':round(ativo_total,2)},
    {'indicator':'Disponibilidades','value':round(disponibilidades,2)},
    {'indicator':'Ativo Circulante','value':round(ativo_circulante,2)},
    {'indicator':'Dí v. Bruta','value':round(div_bruta,2)},
]

# But correct enum wants 'Dí\u00edv. Bruta' -> we'll use 'Dív. Bruta'
indicators = [
    {'indicator':'Ativo','value':round(ativo_total,2)},
    {'indicator':'Disponibilidades','value':round(disponibilidades,2)},
    {'indicator':'Ativo Circulante','value':round(ativo_circulante,2)},
    {'indicator':'Dív. Bruta','value':round(div_bruta,2)},
    {'indicator':'Dív. Líquida','value':round(div_liquida,2)},
    {'indicator':'Patrim. Líq','value':round(patrimonio_liq,2)},
    {'indicator':'Receita Líquida (12 meses)','value':round(rev_ttm,2)},
    {'indicator':'EBIT (12 meses)','value':round(ebit_ttm,2)},
    {'indicator':'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)','value':round(net_ttm,2)},

    {'indicator':'P/L','value':round(pl,6)},
    {'indicator':'P/VP','value':round(pvp,6)},
    {'indicator':'P/EBIT','value':round(p_ebit,6)},
    {'indicator':'PSR','value':round(psr,6)},
    {'indicator':'P/Ativos','value':round(p_ativos,6)},
    {'indicator':'P/Cap. Giro','value':round(p_cap_giro,6)},
    {'indicator':'P/Ativ Circ Liq','value':round(p_ativ_circ_liq,6)},
    {'indicator':'EV / EBITDA','value':round(ev_ebitda,6)},
    {'indicator':'EV / EBIT','value':round(ev_ebit,6)},
    {'indicator':'LPA','value':round(eps_ttm,6)},
    {'indicator':'VPA','value':round(bv_per_share,6)},
    {'indicator':'Marg. Bruta','value':round(marg_bruta,2)},
    {'indicator':'Marg. EBIT','value':round(marg_ebit,2)},
    {'indicator':'Marg. Líquida','value':round(marg_liq,2)},
    {'indicator':'EBIT / Ativo','value':round(ebit_ativo,2)},
    {'indicator':'ROIC','value':round(roic,2)},
    {'indicator':'ROE','value':round(roe,2)},
    {'indicator':'Liquidez Corr','value':round(liquidez_corr,6)},
    {'indicator':'Div Br/ Patrim','value':round(divbr_patrim_ratio,6)},
    {'indicator':'Giro Ativos','value':round(giro_ativos,6)},
]

import json
print(json.dumps({'indicators': indicators}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
